name: Diabetic Marmalade-Using Gelatine
recipeIngredient: 1/2 ounce powdered gelatin (for every 1/2 pint pulp)
recipeInstructions:
1. Carefully remove the rind from the oranges and lemons, ensuring no white pith is included.
2. Chop the removed rinds.
3. Chop up the pulp.
4. Place the chopped pulp and rinds in a preserving pan with 1 pint of water.
5. Gently bring to a simmer for approximately 30 minutes, testing carefully.
6. Continue cooking until both the pulp and rinds are tender.
7. Add the dissolved gelatin into a small amount of the hot syrup.
8. Stir in the saccharin tablets.
9. Remove from heat.
10. Bottle while still hot and cover immediately.
